```mjs title=main.mjs
import { readFile as external_fs_readFile } from "fs";

// virtual-fs

// ./index.js




it('should scope-hoist remapped named imports from external modules', async () => {
  const fs = await import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ 'fs')

  expect(external_fs_readFile).toBe(fs.readFile)
})

export { external_fs_readFile as readFile };

```
